message:
ui: harden search UX, hover reset, and window defaults

- keep search input state in sync with model, reset cursor/selection on clear
- support copy/cut/paste with clipboard getters and render caret safely
- clear stale row hover on list mouse move; retain selection/double-click handling
- disable preview actions when no path and clamp snippet height safely
- set minimum window size and add task cleanup/logging for status/search flows

files.patch:
@@ -208,6 +208,10 @@ fn main() {
                     appears_transparent: false,
                     traffic_light_position: None,
                 }),
+                window_min_size: Some(Size {
+                    width: px(960.0),
+                    height: px(600.0),
+                }),
                 window_background: WindowBackgroundAppearance::Opaque,
                 app_id: Some("com.ultrasearch.desktop".to_string()),
                 ..WindowOptions::default()
